whyUs.title: Why A5S Group?
whyUs.subtitle: We're not an agency. We're two developers who genuinely care about what we build — and about the people we build it for.
whyUs.priceTagline: The most affordable professional web development in Sweden.
whyUs.priceNote: Excluding hosting and domain name. No hidden fees. No long contracts.

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: Simple, fast, and transparent from start to finish.

step1.title: Book a Free Call
step1.desc: Tell us about your project. No commitment, no pressure. We listen and give you honest, straightforward advice.

step2.title: We Plan & Build
step2.desc: We design, develop, and keep you in the loop every step of the way. No surprises, no hidden costs.

step3.title: You Launch & Grow
step3.desc: Your site or app goes live on fast, reliable servers. We stay available for support and future improvements.

items.q: How much does a website cost?
items.a: Starting from 1 000 kr. The final price depends on your requirements — contact us for a free, no-obligation quote.

items.q: How long does it take to build?
items.a: Small websites are typically delivered within 1 week. Larger projects are scoped during our free call.
Yes. We offer hosting on our own servers or can deploy to cloud platforms like AWS. Pricing is separate from development.

items.q: Who will I be working with?
items.a: Directly with us — Mustafe (developer) and Faster (client relations). No middlemen, no outsourcing, ever.

items.q: What if I'm not happy with the result?
items.a: We iterate until you're satisfied. Revisions are included throughout the entire process.

cookies.title: We use cookies
cookies.description: We use cookies to improve your experience on our website. By accepting, you agree to our use of cookies for analytics and personalization.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: A5S Group ("we", "us", "our") is committed to protecting your privacy. This policy explains what data we collect, how we use it, and your rights.

sections.title: 1. What data we collect
sections.content: We may collect your name, email address, and phone number when you fill out our contact or booking form. We also collect anonymous usage data (pages visited, time on site) via cookies to improve our website.

sections.title: 2. How we use your data
sections.content: Your contact details are used solely to respond to your inquiry or schedule a consultation. We do not sell, rent, or share your personal data with third parties for marketing purposes.

sections.title: 3. Cookies
sections.content: We use cookies to remember your language preference and to understand how visitors use our site. You can decline non-essential cookies at any time via the cookie banner.

sections.title: 4. Data storage
sections.content: Data submitted through our forms is stored securely on our servers located in Sweden. We retain contact data for a maximum of 2 years unless you request deletion.

sections.title: 5. Your rights
sections.content: Under GDPR you have the right to access, correct, or delete your personal data at any time. To exercise these rights, contact us at: hello@a5sgroup.com

sections.title: 6. Contact
sections.content: If you have any questions about this policy, reach out to us at hello@a5sgroup.com or via the contact form on our website.
